purpose: Record the exact original failure flow for ananta new-project Fibonacci API and define regression checks proving TemplateProposeHandler intercepts before sgpt/LM Studio propose fallback.
original_problem_flow: User CLI calls ananta new-project "Fibonacci API".
CLI submits goal via submit_goal('new-project', 'Fibonacci API').
Hub receives POST /goals.
Auto-Planner creates six tasks through PlannerAgent.
Autopilot ticks Task #1 with task_kind='coding' or task_kind='new_software_project'.
Autopilot calls POST /tasks/<tid>/step/propose.
propose_task_step() in agent/services/task_scoped_execution_service.py enters propose flow.
_try_handler_propose() returns None because no handler is registered for coding/new_software_project.
_try_hermes_propose() returns None because Hermes is disabled.
_propose_single_task_step() is used as fallback.
_build_task_propose_prompt() writes tool definitions to .ananta/tool-definitions.json as a text file for the LLM to read.
run_llm_cli_command() calls run_sgpt_command().
run_sgpt_command() launches subprocess sgpt --model <model> --no-interaction <prompt>.
sgpt calls LM Studio /v1/chat/completions without an API tools parameter.
Model receives only prompt text and a tool-definitions text file reference/instructions, not a structured tool schema.
Model answers with unstructured prose/Markdown instead of command/tool_calls JSON.
_extract_structured_action_fields(raw_res) calls parse_structured_action_payload().
parse_structured_action_payload() returns None because no structured command/tool_calls payload is present.
Proposal has command=None and tool_calls=None.
Validation fails with missing_required_fields: command_or_tool_calls.
_repair_task_proposal() attempts repair but hits the same structural problem.
Flow returns error llm_failed / autopilot_no_executable_step.

root_cause_layers.problem: The generic propose fallback calls an sgpt subprocess instead of a first-class _execute_llm_call() path with structured tools support. The system expects structured action output but invokes a pathway that cannot reliably provide it.
sgpt passes the prompt to LM Studio but does not pass tool definitions as OpenAI-compatible tools/function schemas. Tool definitions are only written as text for the model to interpret.

The model is only instructed to return JSON/structured output via prompt text. Without tools schema or deterministic handler, it often returns free text, so parse_structured_action_payload cannot extract command/tool_calls.

chosen_fix_strategy.why_handler: _try_handler_propose() runs before _try_hermes_propose() and _propose_single_task_step(). Registering a deterministic handler for coding/new_software_project allows supported tasks to return executable command/tool_calls before sgpt is ever called.
new_flow: TemplateProposeHandler returns TaskScopedRouteResponse with command or tool_calls
_try_hermes_propose() is not reached for supported task
_propose_single_task_step() and sgpt are not reached for supported task
chosen_fix_strategy.scope: This is a pragmatic deterministic propose fix. It does not replace the later artifact-first worker handoff/completion architecture.

criteria: TemplateProposeHandler must be able to return an executable proposal for the exact first Autopilot task produced by ananta new-project 'Fibonacci API'.
TemplateProposeHandler must not call run_llm_cli_command, run_sgpt_command, sgpt, LM Studio or generate_text.
TemplateProposeHandler must produce proposal shape accepted by _extract_structured_action_fields/_try_handler_propose without repair.
After Hub startup with ROLE=hub, registry lookup for task_kind='coding' returns TemplateProposeHandler or handler chain containing it.
After Hub startup with ROLE=hub, registry lookup for task_kind='new_software_project' returns TemplateProposeHandler or handler chain containing it.
Registration order ensures TemplateProposeHandler is considered before generic sgpt propose fallback.
For supported Fibonacci/new-project task, tests monkeypatch run_sgpt_command to raise if called and prove propose still succeeds.
For supported task, response contains command or tool_calls and does not contain error autopilot_no_executable_step.
For supported task, logs/metadata indicate handler path was used.
Execute test proves last_proposal from TemplateProposeHandler is sufficient; no fallback proposal repair is required.
If tool_calls are returned, execute path consumes tool_calls. If execute currently cannot consume tool_calls, handler must return command until tool_calls execution is implemented.
E2E test monkeypatches or instruments sgpt path and proves it is not called for the deterministic Fibonacci new-project flow.
E2E test fails if _propose_single_task_step is reached for the supported first coding/new_software_project task.
E2E test asserts no missing_required_fields: command_or_tool_calls occurs.
Unsupported task_kind still falls back to _propose_single_task_step, so the handler does not disable the legacy path globally.
Fallback behavior is covered by a test where task_kind is unknown and run_sgpt_command is allowed/mocked.

regression_tests_to_add.name: test_template_handler_intercepts_before_sgpt_for_fibonacci
regression_tests_to_add.description: Create a coding/new_software_project Fibonacci task, monkeypatch run_sgpt_command to raise AssertionError if called, call propose, assert command/tool_calls returned.

regression_tests_to_add.name: test_supported_task_never_returns_autopilot_no_executable_step
regression_tests_to_add.description: Assert the supported Fibonacci task propose result has no autopilot_no_executable_step or missing_required_fields command_or_tool_calls error.

regression_tests_to_add.name: test_unknown_task_kind_still_falls_back_to_generic_propose
regression_tests_to_add.description: Use unknown task_kind, assert handler returns None and fallback function is invoked/mocked.

regression_tests_to_add.name: test_new_project_fibonacci_e2e_no_sgpt_propose_path
regression_tests_to_add.description: Run new-project Fibonacci flow and assert generated workspace exists while sgpt propose path is not used for supported template tasks.

implementation_warning: This root-cause file is intentionally separate from the main todo to avoid overwriting the detailed todo. Merge the additional_acceptance_criteria_to_merge into todo.autopilot-template-propose-pipeline.json when doing a full status update.
